src: A Meowth pokemon toy sitting and waving hands, in hyper-realistic anime-inspired style. It has oversized embroidered eyes and sharply defined lines around its face and limbs.
edit: A Meowth pokemon toy sits and waves hands, in gothic-horror style. Eyes resemble eerie voids with dark stitches, body has dark engravings and sharp contours. Limbs in tattered fabric, tendrils around face, and faint mist surrounds it.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The Pokemon is on a dark wooden table in the room corner, viewed slightly from above, with plain white walls.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The Pokémon is viewed slightly from above, placed on a white metal lattice in a room corner with plain white walls.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: A Pokemon is lying on a black background.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The Pokémon is viewed slightly from below, sitting on a metal stick, with one leg hanging down and one partially hidden, against a plain white background.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The pokemon is viewed slightly from above, casting a silhouette on a dark wooden table. The aged table is in the room corner with plain white walls, flickering candlelight creating long shadows, in gothic-horror style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: A shadowy creature viewed slightly from above, perched on an intricate iron lattice in a dim room corner. The walls are aged with crumbling plaster and ornate patterns. Flickering candlelight enhances the gothic-horror style, creating a mysterious ambiance.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: A creature rests against a black backdrop, with deep shadows and unsettling hues, highlighted by a faint glow.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: A shadowy creature looms on a rusted metal spike, shrouded in dark drapery, one leg dangling, the other in shadows. The backdrop is a stark whiteness, enhancing the gothic-horror ambiance.
